text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro? Will you stroke my head for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis? Will you stroke my head for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She nags me until I agree to stroke her head.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My mom always did this for me to make my
headaches go away.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So please... just a little more.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So please... just a little more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan is struggling with a
migraine.
